findings: Silent worker reduction if tmux pane creation fails - no error check at line 1117
PID file write failures go unreported - no error check at line 1186
No stuck detection in launcher; dead workers leave tasks in claimed/ forever
Race condition window: agents instructed to use mv but no POSIX rename enforcement
No validation that commanders actually launched 250 workers - could silently report success with fewer
Teardown only kills tracked PIDs - orphan child processes possible
Smoke test does not cover partial/failed bundle validation
Error handler swallows exceptions silently in mark_run_blocked
